01006D0017F7A000.name: Mario & Luigi Brothership
01006D0017F7A000.description:
The "Mario & Luigi RPG" Series Returns with a Brand-New Title After 9 Years!
Set on islands floating in the vast ocean, the brothers embark on an all-new adventure.

▼ A Story Unfolding in Another World
The story takes place in a land called "Korinkutaru," a world different from the Mushroom Kingdom.
Mario and Luigi will venture to various unknown islands floating on the sea.

▼ "Brother Actions" to Expand Exploration
To embark on their adventure in Korinkutaru, the two brothers must work together.
By learning special cooperative skills called "Brother Actions," they will be able to explore a variety of areas.

▼ Timing and Cooperation Are Key in Battles
The battles feature command-based combat infused with Mario-style action elements.
By pressing specific buttons at the right time during attacks, players can increase the damage dealt and unleash powerful "Brother Attacks."
Similarly, pressing buttons with precise timing during defense allows the brothers to dodge enemy attacks or counter effectively.

▼ A Variety of New Characters Appearing
In the land of Korinkutaru, players will encounter a wide range of characters. In addition to allies who join Mario and Luigi on their journey, unique characters also stand in their way as enemies.
Familiar faces like Princess Peach from the Mushroom Kingdom and Mario's eternal rival Bowser will also make appearances, adding even more charm to the story.
